TRADE_SETUP_DESCRIPTION: SLV Iron Condor ($66/$61 put, $67.50/$74.50 call, April 17, 2026).
MARKET_CONTEXT: After silver's 147% rally (from $30 to $111 in January 2026), SLV has consolidated to $65.79. This post-parabolic consolidation with 70.2% IV creates an ideal premium collection opportunity.
THESIS_POINTS:
• Post-parabolic consolidation with neutral RSI (38.5)
  • Elevated IV (70.2%, 88th percentile) provides premium; expected contraction
  • Gamma walls at $60 (put) and $70 (call) define natural boundaries
  • Analyst consensus supports range-bound behavior through Q2 2026
WHY_NOW_POINTS:
• Post-Parabolic Consolidation Pattern (rare 147% rally → range-bound)
  • IV at 88th Percentile = Fat premium to collect
  • Analyst Consensus Aligned on consolidation view
  • Clean Catalyst Calendar (low tail risk over 11 days)
  • Strong Gamma Walls provide structural price support
MARKET_CONTEXT_FULL: Silver experienced one of the most dramatic rallies in modern commodity history during 2025, surging from $30 to $111.36 on January 27, 2026—a gain of 147%. This move was driven by supply deficits, Chinese export restrictions, massive institutional buying, and accelerating industrial demand. Following this parabolic advance, SLV corrected 29% to $79, then consolidated into the $60-$75 range. Current price of $65.79 represents a new equilibrium.
TECHNICAL_INDICATORS_ROWS: Implied Volatility 70.2% Elevated - favorable for premium selling RSI (14-day) 38.5 Neutral - range-bound expected Put Gamma Wall $60 Strong support Call Gamma Wall $70 Resistance ceiling

ANALYST_CONSENSUS_SUMMARY: No major analyst is calling for immediate breakout. Consensus points to consolidation—precisely the environment where Iron Condors excel.
GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION: Market maker positioning creates natural support and resistance levels through gamma hedging. Put Wall at $60: Dealers must buy SLV as price approaches, creating mechanical support. Call Wall at $70: Dealers must sell as price rallies, creating mechanical resistance.
GAMMA_WALL_TRADE_ALIGNMENT: Our short strikes ($66 put, $67.50 call) are positioned between these walls, with long strikes ($61 put, $74.50 call) aligned just beyond them. This structure takes advantage of natural price containment created by dealer hedging flows.
THETA_EXPLANATION:
What It Means: You earn $10-12 every day SLV stays range-bound.

Why It Matters: 11 days × $10 = $110 potential profit from time decay alone (92% of max profit).
VEGA_EXPLANATION:
Current IV: 70.2% (88th percentile)

Expected Move: IV likely to contract to 50-60% as consolidation continues.

Benefit: 10-point IV drop = +$150 to position value.
